Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Randy Cura vs. Alexandre Bouderbane
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Randy Cura vs. Alexandre Bouderbane

Video.summary: Live from Miami Beach on April 26, 2018, Karate Combat: Inception is the first event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held as a private, invite-only spectacle, this video stream will show all of the key fighters, as it happens. Featured on the Main Card: Elhadji "Black Magic" Ndour of the United States versus Andras “The Titan” Virag, a game contender from Hungary. The co-main event features Dionicio Gustavo of the Dominican Republic versus France's Alexandre Bouderbane in a key contest. Other fighters include Adham Sabry of the USA, Spyros Margaritopoulos of Greece, and Joshua Quayhagen from the USA.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: INCEPTION
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: INCEPTION

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: INCEPTION
KARATE COMBAT: INCEPTION
KARATE COMBAT: INCEPTION

Video.summary: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Chris Smeltzer

Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.

Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Nadege Ait-Ibrahim v. Ana Luiza Ferreira.

Video.summary: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry
KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry
KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry

Video.summary: In this episode, Melissa Croden speaks about some of the things she struggles with as a fighter and how she overcomes those obstacles. Find out how Melissa started out this fight with nerves and anxiety but how she pulled out a huge win against Brittany Paterson.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Melissa Croden
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Melissa Croden

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Melissa Croden
Out of the Cage - Melissa Croden
Out of the Cage - Melissa Croden
